name: Garlic Mayonnaise Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the garlic, chopped green onion tops and bottoms, and olive oil thoroughly.
2. Add the mayonnaise to the mixture and blend well until the oil is absorbed into the mayonnaise.
3. Cover and chill.
Makes about 2 1/2 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: Asparagus, Red Bell Pepper, Broccoli, Potato Skins, Roast Beef, Turkey
